meta.title: Il Futuro Me | Career Guidance for Youth
meta.description: Career guidance platform for young people aged 12-16. Explore careers, labour market and AI's impact on professional futures.

hero.title: Your Future,
hero.subtitle: A platform to discover who you want to become. Explore careers, understand the labour market and prepare for tomorrow's challenges with concrete tools and inspiring content.

home.marketDesc: Up-to-date reports on the most in-demand professions and AI's impact on the world of work.
home.projectDesc: A multidimensional journey for young people aged 12-16, supported by the local Educational Community.
home.archiveDesc: Activity timeline, survey results and downloadable documents from the training programme.

project.title: The Project
project.subtitle: Futuro Me is an integrated, multidimensional journey for young people aged 12-16.
project.overview: The project supports young people in facing decisions and life choices with full self-awareness, through a path involving the entire local Educational Community. It takes place in the Province of Ancona, involving schools in Senigallia, Arcevia and Ostra.
project.obj1Desc: Increase young people's knowledge of training and career opportunities, developing critical thinking and decision-making autonomy.
project.obj2Desc: Strengthen dialogue and parental understanding, enhancing families' ability to support their children in decision-making.
project.obj3Desc: Strengthen the Educational Community's role in guidance processes through an integrated, shared model.
project.wp1Desc: Fact-checking workshops, 'Possibility Fairground' events with universities, career counselling, personalised self-exploration paths and Future Me Avatar creation.
project.wp2Desc: Interactive workshops led by expert psychologists on digital dynamics and personalised consultations to support children's choices.
project.wp3Desc: Periodic meetings, interactive round tables and training workshops for teachers, third-sector workers and families.
project.wp4Desc: Project management, monitoring, impact evaluation, reporting and project communication.

market.title: Labour Market
market.subtitle: Up-to-date data on growing professions, required skills and the impact of artificial intelligence.
market.aiImpactDesc: Artificial intelligence is transforming the labour market. Here's how to prepare.
market.localContextDesc: Focus on the Province of Ancona and the Marche region: employment rates, leading sectors and opportunities for young people.

news.title: News
news.subtitle: News from the world of work, innovation and training. Brief, concrete and up-to-date.

archive.title: Archive
archive.subtitle: Your personal repository. Access survey results, activity reports and documents from the training programme.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Information on the processing of personal data pursuant to EU Regulation 2016/679 (GDPR) and Italian Legislative Decree 196/2003.
privacy.metaDescription: Privacy policy for Il Futuro Me project. Personal data processing under GDPR.
privacy.controllerBody:
The Data Controller is Fondazione Caritas Senigallia ETS, based in Senigallia, Province of Ancona.
Email: info@ilfuturome.it
privacy.dataBody: The site collects only technical data necessary for operation (technical cookies for language preference). No personally identifiable data is collected through site navigation, except for data voluntarily provided by the user via the contact form or email.
privacy.purposeBody:
Any data provided is processed exclusively for:
- Responding to information or collaboration requests.
- Ensuring the technical functioning of the platform (language preference cookie).
- Project monitoring and evaluation activities, in aggregated and anonymised form.
privacy.legalBasisBody: Processing is based on the data subject's consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR) for non-essential cookies, and on the Controller's legitimate interest for technical cookies necessary for site operation.
privacy.retentionBody: Any personal data collected is retained only for the time strictly necessary to fulfil the purposes for which it was collected and in any case no longer than the duration of the project, unless required by law.
privacy.rightsBody:
At any time you may exercise the rights provided by Articles 15-22 of the GDPR:
- Right of access to your data.
- Right to rectification or erasure.
- Right to restriction or objection to processing.
- Right to data portability.

To exercise these rights, write to: info@ilfuturome.it
privacy.cookiesBody:
This site uses only technical cookies necessary for operation:
- Language preference cookie (NEXT_LOCALE): stores the language selected by the user.

No profiling or third-party cookies are used for advertising purposes.
privacy.minorsBody: Il Futuro Me is aimed at young people aged 12 to 16. No personal data of minors is collected through the website. Data collection within the educational project (surveys, assessments) takes place exclusively in person, with parental/guardian consent and in compliance with current regulations on the protection of minors.
privacy.contactBody:
For any questions regarding personal data processing:
Fondazione Caritas Senigallia ETS
Email: info@ilfuturome.it

cookieConsent.message: This site uses technical cookies to ensure proper functioning and to store your language preference.

contacts.metaDescription: Get in touch for information about Il Futuro Me, partnerships or feedback. Fondazione Caritas Senigallia ETS.

footer.description: An innovative platform for navigating the future of work and professional development through guidance tools and inspiring content.
